content.text:
{He changes times and seasons.}{Daniel 2:21}
 {Geometry is the science of correct reasoning on incorrect figures.}{— George Pólya}

Linear transformations in $\R^2$ and $\R^3$ have vivid geometric 
interpretations.

content.title: Reflection
content.problem:
Reflection across the line making angle $\theta$ with the $x$-axis:
\[
F_\theta = \begin{bmatrix} \cos 2\theta & \sin 2\theta \\ \sin 2\theta & -\cos 2\theta \end{bmatrix}
\]
Special cases: $F_0 = \begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\ 0 & -1 \end{bmatrix}$ 
(reflect across $x$-axis).

content.title: Scaling
content.problem:
Scaling by factors $a$ and $b$:
\[
S = \begin{bmatrix} a & 0 \\ 0 & b \end{bmatrix}
\]

content.title: Shear
content.problem:
Horizontal shear by factor $k$:
\[
H = \begin{bmatrix} 1 & k \\ 0 & 1 \end{bmatrix}
\]

marginNotes.text:
The heavens declare the glory of God, 
and the sky above proclaims his handiwork.
